items.title: Refugee Sentenced to 13 Years for Stabbing at Berlin Holocaust Memorial
items.description: A German court found that the attacker, now age 20, had traveled more than 100 miles to stab a Spanish tourist, who survived.

items.title: Iceland Defeats Iceland: A U.K. Supermarket Ends a Trademark Dispute
items.description: Can a company trademark the name of a country? In the case of Iceland, the British grocery store, the answer is no.
